# COM Token Dictionary

Generated UTC: `2026-03-27T19:49:01.6054501Z`

## Grammar

- Pattern: `COM_<ComponentSlotIndex>_<TokenBody>`
- Meaning: The number after COM is the ability-local component slot index. The suffix identifies which field from that component is being formatted into client text.

- Field: `Value[1]`
- Plain-English meaning: Read component slot 1 (component id 3300), then read the selected component's Value[1] field and insert the raw numeric result into client text

- Context tags: `Damage, Heal, Immunity, Knockback, Knockdown, Snare, Stun`
